top_signals.title: Goldman Flags Up Oil Surplus Even as Nations Rebuild Stockpiles
top_signals.summary: The global oil market is set to swing back into oversupply as the impact of the Iran war fades and traffic through the Strait of Hormuz recovers, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB publishes indicative operational calendars for 2028
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ECB publishes indicative operational calendars for 2027
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: USMC awards $20 million contract for first autonomous ground vehicles
top_signals.summary: The Marine Corps is pursuing a first-of-its-kind $20 million production contract for fully autonomous ground vehicles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK house price inflation rises as falling energy costs soften interest rate expectations
top_signals.summary: Annual rate of inflation rose to 2.2% in June, up from 1.7% in May, according to Nationwide
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Anthropic launches AI drug discovery program, joining tech giants in betting on healthcare
top_signals.summary: Anthropic will start an internal drug discovery program, part of a new push to sell artificial intelligence tools to drugmakers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/06 - Form PL - updates to definitions
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies release list of distressed or underserved nonmetropolitan middle-income geographies

top_signals.title: UK’s Starmer unveils $20 billion defense boost in long-delayed investment plan
top_signals.summary: The Defence Investment Plan falls short of the £28 billion($37 billion) wanted by defense chiefs and represents a 5% increase in annual defense spending.

top_signals.title: Lessons from the Underground: How to Combat Business Email Compromise
top_signals.summary: Business Email Compromise is more than an email scam. It's a coordinated operation involving compromised accounts, financial research, and cash-out networks. Flare explores how underground forums reveal how BEC attacks are planned and executed. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: An intelligence budget 'super user' job is now in the hands of Russ Vought
top_signals.summary: Russell Vought, director of the White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB), assumed hands-on responsibility for overseeing the spending plans of intelligence agencies following the recent departure of Amaryllis Fox Kennedy, a senior intelligence official who simultaneously served in multiple roles, including one at OMB.
